libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property is indicated. If tests exercise Activator/OsgiRegistry, use in-memory OSGi Bundle/BundleContext test doubles and implement the OSGi 4.2 Bundle methods required by org.osgi.core 4.2.0.

deterministic_setup.reason: The jersey-core 1.14 POM declares org.osgi:org.osgi.core:4.2.0 as a provided dependency, and com.sun.jersey.core.osgi.OsgiRegistry imports BundleReference from that API. The existing org.osgi:osgi_R4_core:1.0 artifact does not provide BundleReference.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8875 [Automation] java run fails for com.sun.jersey:jersey-core:1.14; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Keeping org.osgi:osgi_R4_core:1.0 alongside org.osgi:org.osgi.core:4.2.0 can create duplicate org.osgi.framework classes; local Gradle verification should confirm classpath behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jersey-core 1.14 added OSGi code that uses org.osgi.framework.BundleReference; the current legacy OSGi test dependency lacks that class, matching the java-run failure.
